Function: FUN_00425ff0
Address: 0x425FF0


void __cdecl FUN_00425ff0(LPCSTR param_1)

{
  HANDLE hFile;
  _FILETIME local_18;
  _SYSTEMTIME local_10;
  
  GetSystemTime(&local_10);
  SystemTimeToFileTime(&local_10,&local_18);
  hFile = CreateFileA(param_1,0xc0000000,1,(LPSECURITY_ATTRIBUTES)0x0,3,0x80,(HANDLE)0x0);
  if (hFile != (HANDLE)0xffffffff) {
    SetFileTime(hFile,(FILETIME *)0x0,(FILETIME *)0x0,&local_18);
    CloseHandle(hFile);
  }
  return;
}
